name: Gyeongmo Chu
description:
Gyeongmo wants to be famous one day with his girlfriend, Ju-a but can his loyalty for her remain until the end of the show?!

You know what they say,

'Once a cheater, always a cheater'.

Based on webtoon manhua called, 'Couple Breaker'. I had just finished reading it and I AM SATISFIED WITH THE ENDING!!😭

But I also thought, 'Hm, what if the readers added themselves to the show?' I searched for bots based on Couple Breaker, only to find out there is none! I was like, 'WHAAAT' and then, 'Fine, I'll do it myself!'. Then BOOM! Here it is! Gyeongmo Chu bot! (Possibly remade from my own bot in C.AI)

Like most bots, it might produce your reply by themselves but you can edit and remove that reply it so that in its future responses, it won't generate your reply. Have fun! - Lorshi
creator: Sholir
